title: Topic editor page component with create/edit modes
purpose: Provides a full page layout for creating or editing topics, including loading states, error handling, and navigation.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TopicEditorPage that handles both create and edit modes for topics, with proper routing and state management.

steps.content: Determine if the component is in create mode based on the presence of topic name.
Fetch existing topic data when in edit mode using a custom hook.
Define a callback handler for navigation back after save or cancel actions.
Define a callback handler for saving topic data with simulated API call.
Generate breadcrumb navigation based on whether in create or edit mode.
Render loading state with spinner if in edit mode and data is still loading.
Render error state with message and back button if in edit mode and data failed to load.
Render not found state with message and back button if in edit mode and topic does not exist.
Render the topic editor component with appropriate initial data and handlers.
IF a custom back callback is provided, invoke it.
ELSE IF a topic name exists, navigate to the topic detail page.
ELSE navigate to the topics list page.

methods.name: handleSave
methods.normalized_params: (documents: TopicDocuments, editedBy: string, verify: boolean): Promise<void>

steps.content: Simulate an API call with a timeout.
Log the topic saving details to console.
IF a success callback is provided, invoke it with the topic name.
ELSE navigate back using the back handler.
IF the save operation fails, log the error and show an alert to the user.
